metadata.title: Confirm if you have attended a Mediation Information and Assessment Meeting: Form FM1
metadata.description: Use this form to confirm to the court if you have attended a Mediation Information and Assessment Meeting. If you have not, you must give the reason why.

Domestic violence you must complete section 2a
